title: ACT Bedwars Resource Pack
description: Dependency of the ACT Bedwars datapack, contains textures & translations required
body:
This resource pack is required to use the [ACT Bedwars datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/act-bedwars), providing necessary custom textures, texts, fonts and such.

Resource pack major version 2 is only compatible with datapack major version 2!

(Otherwise this resource pack has no real use.)

There are some customized death messages to fit the theme of a fighting game better, custom textures for the upgrade keys, other random items and also a few updated font characters to show Iron, Diamond and Emerald in chat.
